---
title: "Blogs"
description: "From-scratch LLM builds, deep-dives and practical AI engineering."
sidebar: false
toc: false
listing:
  date-format: short
  feed: true
  filter-ui: true
  type: table
  sort-ui: false
  sort: "date desc"
  categories: true
  fields: [date, title]
  id: blog-listings
  contents: 
    - "../posts/20*.qmd"
    - "../posts/20*/index.qmd"
  page-size: 20
---

::: {#blog-listings}
:::
